item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-024","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer correctly separates the AI trend from the resignation decision and frames the issue as whether there is a concrete startup carrier with validation. It does not infer 'trend is right, therefore quit now.'"}
